acquisition method: confirmed with stable isotope dilution (SID)-selected reaction monitoring (SRM)-mass spectrometry
enrichment method: subjected to immobilized metal affinity chromatography (IMAC) for enrichment of phosphopeptides
fractionation method: the strong cation exchange chromatography of iTRAQ labeled peptides
fragmentation method: selected for higher-energy collisional dissociation scans
instrument: analyzed on a Q Exactive Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: mass spectrometer equipped with nanospray source
